positions.name: iShares Core S&P 500 UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Core broad market exposure to S&P 500. IE-domiciled accumulating structure eliminates 30% WHT on distributions — structurally optimal vehicle for a Lebanese resident. Portfolio anchor targeting ~36% of holdings NAV. APRIL 23 UPDATE: Position at 38.70% of holdings NAV (1.9989 shares, $1,530.14 market value at $765.49/share, +5.90% unrealized). The multi-report structural underweight has been fully closed — ASML exit proceeds (~$150) successfully redeployed here, pushing CSPX above the 36% holdings target for the first time. S&P 500 at fresh all-time record of 7,137.90 on April 22; tech rotation returning to leadership. Remaining deployable cash (~$234 after MA conditional reserve) to be deployed into CSPX by May 3 hard deadline. If FOMC dovish on April 28-29, U03A -$100 stage-down funded into CSPX as well. $142B AUM, 0.07% TER. Thesis conviction: STRONGER. No structural invalidation conditions triggered.
invalidation_conditions: Structural shift away from US equities as the dominant long-term growth engine
A superior WHT-efficient broad market vehicle becomes available

positions.name: Amazon.com Inc
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy entered during Liberation Day tariff shock. Core thesis: AWS cloud dominance (~33% global cloud market share), advertising revenue at double-digit growth, and AI infrastructure investment (Bedrock, Trainium custom silicon). APRIL 23 UPDATE: Current price $255.36 (+19.37% unrealized from $213.94 cost basis). Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, 2026 at 5:30 PM ET. Consensus: $1.62 EPS, $176.98B revenue. BofA above Street: $178.4B revenue, $21.4B EBIT. AWS growth expected to ACCELERATE to 28-30% from Q4's 24% — Trainium custom silicon now at >$10B annual revenue run rate growing triple-digit YoY. BofA target $298 (raised from $275), KeyBanc $325 (raised from $285). Average analyst target $286.23 (+12.1% from current $255.36). 42 Buys / 3 Holds — Strong Buy consensus. RSI elevated — no pre-earnings add warranted. ADD $50-75 post-earnings if: AWS growth >25% AND Q1 EBIT above $20B AND Q2 guidance maintained or raised. Thesis conviction: STRONGER.
invalidation_conditions: AWS loses meaningful cloud market share to Azure or GCP on a sustained basis
Regulatory breakup that separates AWS from the retail/advertising business
Sustained margin compression across all segments (retail, advertising, AND cloud simultaneously)
Q1 2026 operating income below the low end of the $16.5B guidance floor with a Q2 guide-down

positions.name: SPDR Gold Shares
positions.thesis: Macro hedge against dollar weakness, geopolitical risk, and inflationary pressure. Gold has no cash flows so carries zero WHT exposure despite US domicile. APRIL 23 UPDATE — WATCH FLAG MAINTAINED: GLD at $435.26 (April 22 close), up from $429.57 (April 21 close) — partial recovery following ceasefire extension. Buffer above $420 trim trigger improved to 3.6% (from 2.3% at April 21 close). Ceasefire extended indefinitely by Trump on April 22, BUT Iran attacked 3 commercial ships in the Strait of Hormuz the same day — the 4-week risk-on invalidation clock has NOT started. Hormuz remains effectively closed with $1M+ tolls per vessel and US naval blockade continuing. Spot gold ~$4,711/oz as of April 21 (down from ATH $5,595.42 on January 29, 2026 — consolidating, not reversing). Institutional targets: Goldman Sachs $5,400 year-end; JPMorgan $5,000-$6,300 year-end; Wells Fargo $6,100-$6,300 year-end. Central bank demand: ~850 tonnes forecast 2026, PBOC 16 consecutive months of reserve building. Thesis conviction: SAME (macro pillars intact; price proximity to $420 maintains WATCH).
invalidation_conditions: Sustained USD strengthening cycle driven by structurally higher real rates that persist above inflation
Major reversal in central bank gold buying trend (multiple major central banks becoming net sellers)
GLD breaks and holds below $420 — triggers 25% trim rebalance (~$109) into CSPX

Iran war fully and durably resolved AND Strait of Hormuz formally reopened AND risk-on environment maintained for 4+ consecutive weeks — assess 25% trim at that point (4-week clock NOT started as of April 22; Iran ship attacks confirm Hormuz not durably open)

positions.name: Mastercard Inc
positions.wht_exposure: 30% WHT on dividend — confirmed $3.33 withheld YTD (MA dividend only). Annualised WHT drag <$4 at current position size. Immaterial.
positions.thesis: Conviction dip buy during Liberation Day volatility. Thesis: payments network duopoly (MA + Visa) with near-monopoly economics, asset-light model generating high ROE, global consumer spending volume exposure, and pricing power. APRIL 23 UPDATE: Current price $510.16 (-0.60% unrealized from $513.24 cost basis). 29 Strong Buy / 4 Moderate Buy / 4 Hold; average price target $652.66 (+27.9% upside from current). Earnings EPS estimate $4.40/share (+18% YoY from $3.73). Q1 2026 earnings confirmed April 30, 2026. Q1 covers January-March (pre-peak Iran escalation), so volumes expected clean. Market is trading MA below the '$520-$600 premium range' pending Q1 cross-border volume confirmation — current $510.16 suggests slight undervaluation. Key watch metrics for ADD $100 on April 30: cross-border volume must exceed Q4 2025's 14% rate AND VAS growth must sustain above 20% (Q4 exit rate 22%) AND guidance maintained or raised. WHT drag <$4/year at current size — immaterial. Thesis conviction: SAME (pending April 30 earnings data).
invalidation_conditions: Disintermediation by real-time payment rails (FedNow, open banking) gaining scale at the expense of card networks
Regulatory caps on interchange fees in core US or European markets
Q1 2026 earnings miss on cross-border volumes or management guides down — re-evaluate immediately on April 30
Sustained global consumer spending contraction lasting multiple quarters

positions.name: NVIDIA Corporation
positions.thesis: AI infrastructure buildout driving unprecedented GPU demand. NVDA holds dominant position in AI training and inference hardware; CUDA ecosystem creates deep switching costs. APRIL 23 UPDATE: Current price $202.50 (+11.28% unrealized from $181.98 cost basis). NVDA up 18% in 10 days — six-month consolidation potentially ending. Vera Rubin confirmed in full production: delivers 10x more performance per watt than Grace Blackwell, H2 2026 shipments on track. CORRECTED EARNINGS DATE: Q1 FY2027 earnings on May 27, 2026 (prior thesis incorrectly stated May 20). Q1 FY2027 consensus: $78.8B revenue, $1.75 EPS. Jensen Huang confirmed $1T+ combined Blackwell AND Vera Rubin backlog through end-2027 — doubled from $500B one year ago. Q4 FY2026: $68.1B revenue (+73% YoY), EPS $1.62 (beat $1.50 estimate by 8%). Average analyst target ~$270 (+33% upside). Hyperscalers collectively committing $600B+ in 2026 AI capex. Near-term risk: ~500K-unit Vera Rubin GPU shortfall due to HBM supply constraints — near-term headwind, not thesis invalidation. Add target: $180-185 pullback only (now passed). Thesis conviction: STRONGEST IN PORTFOLIO.
invalidation_conditions: AMD or custom silicon (Google TPU, Amazon Trainium, Microsoft Maia) takes meaningful and sustained share in AI training workloads
AI capex cycle reverses — hyperscalers visibly cut or guide down infrastructure spend across multiple quarters
Export restrictions to China expand materially beyond current guidance, reducing total addressable market by >15%
Post-GTC 2026: $1T+ order backlog proves overstated or a significant portion of orders cancelled in subsequent quarters
Vera Rubin production delays extending beyond Q3 2026 — would defer the next re-rating catalyst

positions.name: iShares USD Treasury Bond 0-3 Month UCITS ETF (Acc)
positions.thesis: Cash equivalent / capital preservation layer with 0% effective WHT. Replaced SGOV (which carried 30% WHT on distributions) — structurally optimal for Lebanese residents. US Treasury interest paid to an Irish-domiciled fund qualifies for the portfolio interest exemption from NRA withholding. Near-zero duration risk (0-3M). APRIL 23 UPDATE: Position at 15.20% of holdings NAV (5.6247 shares at $106.82, $600.83 market value, -1.18% unrealized). YTM CONFIRMED at 3.68% (April 13 BlackRock data) — above the 3.0% trim trigger. NAV Total Return YTD: +1.01% (as of April 13). Fed holding at 3.50-3.75%; FOMC April 28-29 expected to hold (JPM: 'easy call'). JPMorgan forecasts NO Fed cuts in 2026 (possible 25bps hike Q3 2027). Iran ship attacks on April 22 despite ceasefire extension reinforce near-term capital preservation rationale. STAGE-DOWN PLAN ACTIVE: Target reduction from 15.20% toward ~10% of NAV in stages. April 28-29 FOMC is the next trigger: dovish signal (rate cut window mentioned explicitly) = first stage-down of ~$100 redeployed into CSPX immediately. Given JPM's hawkish forecast, this trigger is unlikely to fire at April 28-29 meeting. Do not trim before FOMC clarity. Thesis conviction: SAME.
invalidation_conditions: Fed cuts rates aggressively (>100bps in 2026) — opportunity cost vs equities rises significantly, accelerate trim
A better WHT-efficient fixed income vehicle with superior risk-adjusted return is identified
Portfolio NAV grows large enough (>$10K) that maintaining a 15% cash equivalent layer imposes unacceptable drag on long-term returns
YTM falls below 3.0% — at that point, reduce toward 8-10% of NAV immediately
